scripts.build: parcel build src/background.ts src/content.ts src/sidepanel.html && powershell -Command "Copy-Item src/manifest.json dist/manifest.json -Force; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist/icons -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Recurse src/icons dist/icons"
scripts.build:release: parcel build src/background.ts src/content.ts src/sidepanel.html --no-source-maps && powershell -Command "Copy-Item src/manifest.json dist/manifest.json -Force; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist/icons -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Recurse src/icons dist/icons; Remove-Item dist/*.map -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.package: npm run build:release && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path dist/* -DestinationPath noserver-ai.zip -Force"
